hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | while read -r f; do case "$f" in frontend/src/*.ts|frontend/src/*.tsx|frontend/src/*.css|frontend/src/*.js|frontend/src/*.jsx) (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/frontend" && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null) || (cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}" && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null) || true ;; esac; done || true

cat <<'JSON'
{
  "hookSpecificOutput": {
    "hookEventName": "SessionStart",
    "additionalContext": "## Project: CIBO Datahub

Key directories:
- `eco_data_sdk/` — shared SDK for eco data pipeline
- `cn_stock/` — China stock data pipeline
- `hk_funds/` — Hong Kong funds KYP/DD pipeline
- `us_listings/` — US listings data
- `us_corp_actions/` — US corporate actions (SEC 8-K)
- `announcements/` — company announcements
- `mcp/` — MCP server implementations
- `frontend/` — Next.js frontend (check AGENTS.md before editing)

MCP tools: `eco-data` server with 13 tools for economic data, risk indicators, and name screening."
  }
}
JSON
